title: sphaeralcea hastulata
intro: Sphaeralcea hastulata, also known as the globe mallow or orange globe mallow, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea hastulata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Sphaeralcea hastulata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
